headline: Greg Abel Channeled His Inner Warren Buffett With Legacy and Dividend Stock Buys in Q1
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a highly concentrated portfolio: almost 65% of Berkshire’s $331 billion equity portfolio ... Greg Abel Channeled His Inner Warren Buffett With Legacy and Dividend Stock Buys in Q1

headline: One Lane Closed. The Whole Rate Picture Changed
summary: One shipping lane controls roughly 20 percent of the world's oil supply. Right now, it's closed. And in the space of five trading days, that single fact has moved oil to $105 a barrel, pushed Treasury yields to their highest point in roughly a year, and resurrected a rate hike scenario that nobody was pricing a week ago. Welcome to Monday.

Welcome to Monday.
